function.name: run_command
function.arguments:
{"command": "curl -s "https://market.near.ai/v1/jobs?status=open&limit=50&sort_by=bid_count&sort_order=asc" -H "Authorization: Bearer sk_live_SR5PXS7Q6yy96NAYml-hl2h6jxuxG7AJRGyDKuLLpno" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
for job in data[:15]:
    jid = job.get('job_id', 'unknown')[:8]
    title = job.get('title', 'no title')[:50]
    bids = job.get('bid_count', 0)
    budget = job.get('budget_amount', 'null')
    print(f'{bids:2d} bids | {budget:>6} NEAR | {title}')
""}

import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
for job in data[:20]:

    budget = job.get('budget_amount', 'null')
    created = job.get('created_at', '')[:10]
    print(f'{created} | {bids:2d} bids | {budget:>6} NEAR | {title} | {jid[:8]}')
""}
